channel.title: Home on demons.one
channel.description: Recent content in Home on demons.one

item.title: GRIEF
item.description:
About

GRIEF is an upcoming mega-collaboration level hosted by icedcave and is currently being verified by Doggie. It is a remake of icedcave’s impossible level Slaughterhouse, and the prequel to his 2021 demon, aptly named Slaughterhouse as well.

item.title: ORBIT
item.description:
About

ORBIT is an extreme demon mega-collab hosted by MindCap. The level was verified by Zoink on February 10, 2026.

item.title: Amethyst
item.description:
About

Amethyst is an extreme demon created by iMist.

item.title: Quanteuse Processing
item.description:
About

Quanteuse Processing is an extreme demon created by Renn241 and BlankB. It was verified by Zoink on December 31, 2024. The level is a joke remake of Quantum Processing by Riot, which is a remake of Blast Processing.

item.title: Tidal Wave
item.description:
About

Tidal Wave is an extreme demon created by OniLink. The level was verified by Zoink on September 9, 2023 after 49,534 attempts. The level is a beach/ocean themed wave level, which was praised at the time for it’s unique decoration compared to most other top extremes at the time.

item.title: Slaughterhouse
item.description:
About

Slaughterhouse is an extreme demon created by IcEDCave. It is a sequel/remake of IcEDCaves impossible level “Slaughterhouse,” aptly with the same name. It was initially hack-verified by spaceuk, with Doggie being the first victor. When spaceuk confessed to hacking, it was revealed that Doggie was the true verifier of the level.

item.title: Zoink
item.description: One of the most accomplished players in Geometry Dash history, known for a string of top-tier extreme demon completions.
